title.zh: OpenAI 发布 GPT-5 预览版，多模态推理能力大幅提升
title.en: OpenAI Releases GPT-5 Preview with Major Multimodal Reasoning Upgrades

desc.zh: OpenAI 正式推出 GPT-5 预览版，在多模态推理与代码生成方面取得重大突破。新模型在主流基准测试中全面超越 GPT-4o，支持图像、音频与文本混合输入。
desc.en: OpenAI released GPT-5 Preview, showing major gains in multimodal reasoning and code generation. The model outperforms GPT-4o across major benchmarks with mixed image, audio, and text input support.

title.zh: Google DeepMind AlphaFold 3 突破蛋白质-DNA 相互作用预测
title.en: Google DeepMind AlphaFold 3 Breaks Through Protein-DNA Interaction Prediction

desc.zh: DeepMind 的 AlphaFold 3 现在不仅能预测蛋白质结构，还能预测蛋白质-DNA 与蛋白质-配体相互作用，为药物发现和合成生物学开辟了全新可能。
desc.en: AlphaFold 3 now predicts protein-DNA and protein-ligand interactions in addition to protein structures, opening new avenues for drug discovery and synthetic biology.

title.zh: Anthropic 发布 Claude 4 系统卡：全面披露模型安全评估结果
title.en: Anthropic Releases Claude 4 System Card with Full Safety Evaluation Disclosure

desc.zh: Anthropic 发布了 Claude 4 的系统卡，详细披露安全评估内容，涵盖 CBRN 风险、自主性风险以及公开部署前的社会影响分析。
desc.en: Anthropic published the Claude 4 system card with detailed safety evaluations: CBRN risk, autonomy risk, and societal impact assessments conducted before deployment.

title.zh: Meta 开源 Llama 4 多模态系列，Scout 与 Maverick 双版本上线
title.en: Meta Open-Sources Llama 4 Multimodal Series: Scout & Maverick Now Available

desc.zh: Meta 发布 Llama 4 Scout（170 亿激活参数）和 Maverick（MoE 架构），两款模型均支持多模态输入，已在 Hugging Face 以商业友好许可证开放使用。
desc.en: Meta released Llama 4 Scout (17B active params) and Maverick (MoE), both supporting multimodal input. Available on Hugging Face under a commercial-friendly license.

title.zh: 微软 Copilot 全线集成 GPT-5，企业用户率先获得访问权限
title.en: Microsoft Copilot Integrates GPT-5 Across All Products, Enterprise First

desc.zh: 微软宣布 Microsoft 365 Copilot 将全面集成 GPT-5，企业版用户优先获得体验资格。升级后在文档摘要和代码辅助准确率方面有显著提升。
desc.en: Microsoft announced GPT-5 integration across Copilot for Microsoft 365, with enterprise customers getting priority rollout. Accuracy in summarization and coding assistance improves noticeably.

title.zh: AI 芯片市场 2026 年预计突破 5000 亿美元，英伟达持续领跑
title.en: AI Chip Market Forecast to Exceed $500B in 2026, NVIDIA Leads Growth

desc.zh: 最新市场报告显示，受大模型训练与推理需求驱动，全球 AI 芯片市场预计 2026 年突破 5000 亿美元，英伟达 H200/B100 系列继续主导市场。
desc.en: A new market report projects the global AI chip market to exceed $500B in 2026, driven by LLM training and inference demand. NVIDIA dominates with its H200/B100 product lines.

title.zh: 斯坦福研究：思维链提示对小型模型效果有限，需要新策略
title.en: Stanford: Chain-of-Thought Prompting Loses Effectiveness in Small Models

desc.zh: 斯坦福最新研究表明，思维链提示在参数量低于 7B 的模型上效果显著下降，研究团队提出"渐进式推理"策略以弥补这一差距。
desc.en: A Stanford study shows chain-of-thought prompting loses effectiveness in sub-7B models. The team proposes a "progressive reasoning" strategy to bridge the gap.

title.zh: AI 视频生成大比拼：Sora vs Runway vs Kling 全维度横向测评
title.en: AI Video Showdown: Sora vs Runway vs Kling — Full Comparative Review

desc.zh: MIT Tech Review 对三款主流 AI 视频生成工具进行系统测评，从画质、一致性、运动流畅度与提示遵从度四维度对比，各有优劣。
desc.en: MIT Tech Review evaluated Sora, Runway, and Kling across quality, consistency, motion smoothness, and prompt adherence — revealing nuanced trade-offs among the three tools.
